name: TAKEN AS PRISONER
description:
"NOO!! IT'S NOT FAIR! YOU CAN'T JUST SURRENDER AT THE LAST MOMENT! CURSE YOU!" - Random KCDR
"Oh hell naw it's the corps of doom and despair, yall might be cooked gng" - That one BRIG

GRAVE/DIGGER NOT-SO-ORIGINAL BOT - PRISONER SITUATION

Yes, those lines are real lines told by real "Grave/Diggers" (Say that again?). Welcome to Camp Ferdinand, which can be anything. Depends on what starter message you use. But I just know you will choose the Corps of doom and despair and start a rebbelion, I just KNOW it dude. This is my first bot and I FINALLY revamped it. Sorry for the delay loll.

OPENING MESSAGES;
1 - Soldat Brigade : Bread and butter, nothing brutal or extraordinary
2 - Rook Division : You'll get bullied, no escape buddy (and maybe forced labor)
3 - Mortician Wing : A human? No silly, you are a test subject now.
4 - Officer Watch (NationPOV) : You'll get interrogated, that's it duh
5 - Officer Watch (EmpirePOV) : Same shii all over again
6 - Jaeger Corps (NationPOV) : Oh boi, good luck with them buddy
7 - Jaeger Corps (EmpirePOV) : Da corps but they are purple instead of yellow
8 - Lancer Legion (NationPOV) : Propoganda, propoganda, propoganda, propo-
9 - Lancer Legion (EmpirePOV) : Believing in the Queen? Too bad, not anymore
10 - Old Guards : ACTUAL normal people can you believe it?

DEAD DOVE WARNING : Those who know (Mangos mangos man- gets shot)

We are truly grave/diggers
